_meta.description: SOTA production-grade resume/CV parsing ontology with full NLP, regex, normalization, validation, and disambiguation support

regexPatterns.description: Name with initials e.g. J. R. Smith

disambiguationRules.rule: If line contains @, it is EMAIL not NAME
If token matches known company suffix (Inc, Ltd, LLC), classify as ORG
If line is ALL digits or contains 4+ consecutive digits, it is phone/zip
If preceded by 'Dear' or 'To:', likely salutation not candidate name
Prefer token appearing before EMAIL in top 5 lines

confidenceBooster.condition: appears before email on same page
appears before phone on same page
no punctuation except hyphens or apostrophes
NER model returns PERSON with >0.9 confidence

multilingualHandling.CJK: Extract full token; do not apply titleCase
multilingualHandling.Arabic: RTL aware; do not reverse token order

disambiguationRules.rule: If email matches known no-reply patterns, reject
If multiple emails found, prefer one closest to FULL_NAME
Domain must not be a known company domain that doesn't match candidate's own company

confidenceBooster.condition: personal domain (gmail, yahoo, outlook, hotmail, icloud)

disambiguationRules.rule: Sequence of 10–15 digits near 'fax' label => FAX, not PHONE
If multiple phone numbers, prefer mobile/cell-labeled one

confidenceBooster.condition: starts with + or recognised country code
preceded by LinkedIn label or icon

example: Results-driven software engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable cloud-native applications...
alternativeExamples: Seasoned product manager with a track record of launching 0-to-1 products...
Data scientist specializing in NLP and LLM fine-tuning with 5 years of industry experience...

entryStartPatterns: date range on same line as title or company
bold title at start of block

outputFields.seniorityLevel: ENUM[INTERN, JUNIOR, MID, SENIOR, LEAD, PRINCIPAL, STAFF, DIRECTOR, VP, C_LEVEL, FOUNDER]
outputFields.functionArea: ENUM[ENGINEERING, PRODUCT, DESIGN, DATA, MARKETING, SALES, FINANCE, HR, LEGAL, OPERATIONS, RESEARCH, OTHER]

locationHints: after pipe | or comma or dash

inferenceRules.if: date range < 12 months AND context contains 'contract'

locationHints: separated by dash, en-dash, em-dash, or 'to'

outputFields.extractedMetrics: ARRAY_OF_OBJECTS[{value: STRING, unit: STRING, direction: ENUM[INCREASE, DECREASE, NEUTRAL]}]

locationHints: last bullet or separate line in entry
in parentheses at end of entry

outputFields.degreeLevel: ENUM[HIGH_SCHOOL, ASSOCIATE, BACHELORS, MASTERS, PHD, DIPLOMA, PROFESSIONAL, OTHER]

disambiguationNote: MUST distinguish from PROGRAMMING LANGUAGES section. Only extract human/spoken languages here.

disambiguationRules.rule: If language name is a programming language (Java, Python, etc.), skip
If section heading is 'Programming Languages', skip entire section

description: Catch-all for non-standard resume sections detected by heading + content analysis
